body.content: These Terms of Use define the legal conditions regarding the use of the MyPrograms mobile application. By downloading, installing, or using the application, you are deemed to have accepted these terms. If you do not accept these terms, you must not use the application.

MyPrograms is an academic planning application designed to help students organize their class schedules, exam dates, and assignments. The application operates based on data entered by users and is not an official educational institution or academic record system.
MyPrograms is only an auxiliary tool and does not replace official academic records. The accuracy of the information entered by the user is entirely the user's responsibility.

content: The developer is not responsible for consequences arising from incorrect or incomplete data entry
The developer cannot be held responsible if notifications (reminders) fail due to device settings, battery optimization, or technical reasons
The developer is not responsible for academic failure, missed exams, or similar outcomes

body.content: The MyPrograms application stores user data locally on the device. The application does not send any data to a central server.
Responsibility for data security and backups lies entirely with the user.

content: Data may be permanently lost if the application is deleted
There is no guarantee of data recovery if the device is lost or reset
The user agrees to take regular backups

body.content: The MyPrograms application is provided as open source and is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License (AGPL). The source code of the application is publicly available and may be used, modified, and distributed in accordance with the license terms.

content: The source code of the application is accessible via GitHub and is subject to AGPL license terms
Modifications and derivative works must be shared under the same license (AGPL)
Modified versions made available over a network must also provide their source code
Failure to comply with license terms may result in legal liability

body.content: Users are obligated to use the application in accordance with applicable laws and these Terms of Use.

content: Using the application for illegal purposes
Attempting to disrupt the security or operation of the application

body.content: The developer reserves the right to update these Terms of Use at any time. Changes become effective as of the date they are updated.
Users are advised to review the current terms regularly. Continued use of the application constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, you may contact us.
